title: BIRTH EDUCATION CLASSES - 211info
text: PROVIDENCE WILLAMETTE FALLS MEDICAL CENTER BIRTH EDUCATION CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides virtual and in-person classes to help in childbirth preparation. Topics include pregnancy, labor, comfort techniques, medical procedures, cesarean birth, newborns, and postpartum. 1500 Division Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Pregnant individuals in the 2nd and 3rd trimester and their support partners Hours: Varies by class (503) 216-5641 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 656-1631 Main phone Main phone (503) 216-5641 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by class. Accepts Providence Health Plan, AllCare, CareOregon, Jackson Care Connect, and Yamhill Community Care. Financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: In-person classes: English Virtual classes: English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Arabic, Japanese, Chinese AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, use Emergency entrance from 9pm-5am Services: Childbirth Education Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - DOULA SERVICES INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HOSPITAL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PROVIDENCE WILLAMETTE FALLS MEDICAL CENTER
